    Librus v31 — Minor Version Log

    Base tag: V31-260617 (2026-06-17)
    Convention: same date + suffix letter (a → b → …) per shipped iteration.
    Each entry records from → to, functions touched, and code blocks with per-block iteration (before → after).

    Current revision: V31-260621b

    Letter f was never assigned; context-panel work between e and g shipped without a dedicated suffix.

    V31-260621b — 2026-06-21 — Owl brand, brown chrome, white library, tablet prose fix (r83)

    Build: v31-r83 · Cache: librus-v31-r83

    Area Summary
    Brand globe_book → owl (icons/brand-owl.svg); favicons + PWA/social PNGs on #8b4513
    Chrome Topbar #8b4513; library body + book cards white
    Tablet 50/50 split: minmax(0,1fr) grid + flexible main search — fixes prose clipping
    Offline context-offline.html; settings update UI; map/context polish (r82 carry-over)

    Deploy: dev + prod → GitHub Pages.

    V31-260620c/w — 2026-06-20 — Combined Pages deploy (prod /, dev /dev/)

    Area Summary
    Workflow Push to dev or prod rebuilds one artifact: prod branch → site root, dev branch → /dev/
    Domains No CNAME in repo; custom domains (librus.app) unchanged until docs + DNS cutover

    Preview: https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/dev/ · Prod: https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/

    V31-260620b/v — 2026-06-20 — Lighthouse pass, brand cleanup, prod deploy

    Build: v31-r81 · Cache: librus-v31-r81

    Deploy: dev + prod → GitHub Pages.

    Lighthouse (localhost)

    Mode Perf A11y Best SEO LCP CLS
    Desktop 100 100 100 100 0.5s 0
    Mobile 98 100 100 100 1.8s 0
    Area Summary
    A11y Status LED uses aria-labelledby on .status-led-sr (fixes label/name mismatch)
    Brand Title + topbar show LIBRUS only; build/deploy stays in settings panel
    Cleanup desktop.json / mobile.json gitignored and untracked

    V31-260620a/u — 2026-06-20 — Holmes library, TOC cap, prod cleanup

    Build: v31-r80 · Cache: librus-v31-r80 · UI: LIBRUS v.31u

    Deploy: dev + prod → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    Library 60 Holmes books with uniform chronology frontmatter; manifest-driven sort; no partial 12-book fallback
    TOC Inline groups, h3 max (h4 removed from list + dead CSS); scroll sync at viewport center
    MD blocks ::: center alignment; ::: expand chevron; ::: bible magenta style
    Cleanup Removed assets/, ingest script, .ingest-cache; prod strips all bundled books
    File Change
    books/*.md 60 files — chronology, # / ## headers
    books/manifest.json Full chronology-sorted manifest
    main.js chronologyFromFrontmatter, empty BUNDLED_MANIFEST_FILES, TOC h3 cap
    style.css TOC density, block styles, removed .reader-toc-item-deep
    .github/scripts/clean-prod-branch.sh All books/*.md removed on prod
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r80

    Block-tag convention (from s)

    Tags use major (whole app) + minor (that code block’s last touch), separated by /:

    File Example
    index.html BLOCK 01 … | V31-260617s/s — …
    main.js // V31-260617s/a | SECTION 01: …
    style.css SECTION 01 … | V31-260617s/p
    • Major (V31-260617s) — current app ship; bumps on each released iteration (a → b → …).
    • Minor (s, a, r, …) — per-block letter; only the block(s) you edit advance.

    V30-260616 → V31-260617a

    Initial v31 sandbox from v30
    Added Full app scaffold: loadSettingsFromStorage, saveSettings, scanAndImportBooks, importBookFromPath, renderLibraryGrid, markdownToHtml, loadBook, toggleOverlayPanel, bindAllListeners, initApp, settings panel handlers, context iframe navigation
    Removed v30 FAB, theme icon toggle, DuckDuckGo-style web-search provider (later pass)
    Modified Migrated from V30-260616 block tags; 6:9 library covers; settings overlay at app level

    Lighthouse audits (V31-260617r baseline)

    Audited against local static host, entry URL index.html?library (library view), after perf/PWA passes (no background full-book hydration; reload-only session restore).

    Form factor Performance Accessibility Best practices SEO Sum
    Desktop 100 100 100 100 400
    Mobile 100 100 100 100 400

    PWA category scored separately in DevTools (installable manifest, SW, icons); not included in the 400 totals above.

    Re-run before major releases: npx lighthouse http://127.0.0.1:PORT/index.html?library --form-factor=desktop|mobile

    V31-260617r → V31-260617s

    Modified .github/scripts/clean-prod-branch.sh; Lighthouse table in this log

    Deploy URLs (GitHub Pages)

    URL Branch source Library
    https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/ prod @ site root Empty (upload-only)
    https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/dev/ dev @ /dev preview Sherlock (12 adventures)

    Workflow: push prod or dev → .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml builds _site via prepare-pages-artifact.sh.

    Filter Text matches quote, body, replies; resets on book switch

    V31-260619b/s patch — card hover semantic tints restored

    Build: v31-r65 · Cache: librus-v31-r65 · UI: librus v.31t

    Hover Color
    Quote --text-primary
    Reply Green
    Share Blue
    Delete Red

    V31-260619b/r patch — card icon hover full contrast

    Build: v31-r64 · Cache: librus-v31-r64 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Card hover All card actions → --text-primary (quote, reply, share, delete)

    V31-260619b/q patch — card icons lighter than compose

    Build: v31-r63 · Cache: librus-v31-r63 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Card row Idle/hover mixed with --panel-notes-card-bg — recedes on yellow cards
    Compose Highlight/save stay stronger (52% primary enabled)

    V31-260619b/p patch — softer notes icons (a11y floor)

    Build: v31-r62 · Cache: librus-v31-r62 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Card row Idle = --text-muted; hover + semantic tints stay above WCAG 3:1 non-text
    Compose 48% primary mix enabled; disabled blends toward panel bg

    V31-260619b/o patch — notes icon contrast balance

    Build: v31-r61 · Cache: librus-v31-r61 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Compose Highlight/save darker grey (--icon-notes-compose); disabled legible, not 38% fade
    Card row Quote/reply/share/delete softer idle + muted semantic hovers

    V31-260619b/n patch — note body size + italic

    Build: v31-r60 · Cache: librus-v31-r60 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Note body font-size-lg (1rem), font-style: italic on .reader-notes-body-text

    V31-260619b/m patch — card action idle tint (refine)

    Build: v31-r59 · Cache: librus-v31-r59 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Scope Card row only (quote, reply, share, delete) — not highlight/save compose
    Idle --icon-notes-idle 78% primary — subtler than full, stronger than before

    V31-260619b/k patch — notes textarea placeholder wrap

    Build: v31-r57 · Cache: librus-v31-r57 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Placeholder ::placeholder white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: anywhere
    Textarea rows="3", field-sizing: content, taller min-height

    V31-260619b/j patch — compose placeholder copy

    Build: v31-r56 · Cache: librus-v31-r56 · UI: librus v.31t

    State Placeholder
    Empty Select text, then save as Highlight OR Write note
    Quote selected Select text, then save as Note

    V31-260619b/i patch — quote size + date format

    Build: v31-r55 · Cache: librus-v31-r55 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Date DDMMMYY HH:MM local (e.g. 19Jun26 14:30)
    Quote snippet .reader-notes-quote font-size-md (0.875rem)

    V31-260619b/h patch — Zen Kurenaido note body font

    Build: v31-r54 · Cache: librus-v31-r54 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Note body Zen Kurenaido (OFL) — legible natural hand, same Zen family as Loop without playful loops
    Subset ZenKurenaido-latin.woff2 + latin-ext (~14 KiB total)
    Hierarchy Quote stays Roboto Slab; comment/reply body at 0.9375rem

    V31-260619b/g patch — annotation date + quote typography

    Build: v31-r53 · Cache: librus-v31-r53 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Date YYMMMDD HHMM local (e.g. 26Jun19 1430)
    Quote snippet .reader-notes-quote uses --reader-font-family (Roboto Slab)

    V31-260619b/f patch — notes action button hover tints

    Build: v31-r52 · Cache: librus-v31-r52 · UI: librus v.31t

    Button Hover
    Quote (jump) Default neutral tint
    Reply / Save note Green
    Highlight Yellow
    Share Blue
    Delete Red

    V31-260619b/e patch — notes compose placeholder

    Build: v31-r51 · Cache: librus-v31-r51 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary
    Compose placeholder Selection hint moved from preview strip into #notes-input placeholder
    Quote preview Hidden when empty; shows quoted passage only after text selection
    index.html / main.js / style.css syncNotesComposePlaceholder(); .is-empty display none

    V31-260619b/d patch — notes compose pinned top, filled jump icon

    Build: v31-r50 · Cache: librus-v31-r50 · UI: librus v.31t

    Deploy: dev → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    Notes layout Compose + selection preview fixed at top; saved notes scroll in .reader-notes-scroll
    Jump icon format_quote (U+E244) uses FILL 1 — solid glyph, not confused with “99”
    index.html / style.css / main.js BLOCK 13 restructure; icon-glyph-filled
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r50

    V31-260619b/c patch — main/context equal width, 460px floor

    Build: v31-r49 · Cache: librus-v31-r49 · UI: librus v.31t

    Deploy: dev → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    Reader grid When notes is a column, main + context use minmax(28.75rem, 1fr) — equal split, 460px minimum each
    Overflow .reader-layout horizontal scroll when viewport is narrower than grid minimum
    style.css --reader-split-min; SECTION 19 breakpoints ≥1201px
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r49

    V31-260619b/b patch — doutrina MD parser + TOC filter

    Build: v31-r48 · Cache: librus-v31-r48 · UI: librus v.31t

    Deploy: dev → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    MD parser h1–h6, {#id} anchors, ::: block syntax, inline bold/links, multi-line paragraphs
    TOC h2–h4 only (per style guide); nested indent; live filter on #toc-filter-input
    main.js / style.css SECTION 11 + TOC/prose/block styles
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r48

    V31-260619a/z patch — centered larger library cover titles

    Build: v31-r47 · Cache: librus-v31-r47 · UI: librus v.31t

    Deploy: dev → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    Library covers Title font-size-lg, vertically centered on cover; author pinned to bottom
    style.css Grid overlay on .library-grid-cover
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r47

    Build: v31-r46 · Cache: librus-v31-r46 · UI: librus v.31t

    Area Summary

    Build: v31-r19 · Cache: librus-v31-r19

    PDF — (Doutrina only)

    V31-260618z/z patch-b — wide button radius + collapsible chevron

    Build: v31-r18 · Cache: librus-v31-r18

    Area Summary
    Buttons .btn-wide back to --radius-md; icon/secondary buttons stay round
    Settings Collapsible summary shows chevron (right → down when open)

    V31-260618z/z patch — UI polish, PWA update LED, favicons

    Build: v31-r17 · Cache: librus-v31-r17 · Font: 260618x
    Deploy: push dev → https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/dev/

    Area Summary
    Buttons All button / .btn-wide / .btn-secondary use border-radius: 50%
    Notes Highlight icon fixed to format_ink_highlighter (U+F82B); export moved to Settings Off-load
    Lookup Clears cached {query} after highlight save and when selection collapses
    Library .library-body min-height: 0 + overflow: hidden restores grid scroll
    Settings Lookup-provider hints in collapsible <details>
    PWA LED SW no longer auto-skipWaiting on install; update poll + librus:pwa-ready event
    Favicons syncFaviconForTheme() follows app theme; outlined globe_book SVGs

    V31-260618y/y patch — Notes highlight icon

    Build: v31-r16 · Cache: librus-v31-r16 · Font: 260618w

    Area Summary
    Notes Highlight button uses format_ink_highlighter (U+E6E1); font subset verified

    V31-260618x/x patch — RELEASE (Notes icons + accessible hovers)

    Build: v31-r15 · Cache: librus-v31-r15 · Font: 260618v
    Deploy: push dev → https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/dev/

    Area Summary
    Notes UI Compose + card actions use icon-btn (r13); share green / delete red hover (r14)
    A11y --icon-share-hover / --icon-delete-hover — WCAG AA ≥ 4.5:1 on card hover plate (r15)
    CI Dev-only Pages at /dev/; prod branch no longer triggers deploy

    r13 → r15 delta

    Build Change
    v31-r13 Notes text buttons → icons; font subset +4 glyphs
    v31-r14 .icon-btn-share green hover, .icon-btn-danger red hover
    v31-r15 Theme-aware hover tokens: light #186d30 / #b3261e, dark #51cf66 / #fa5252

    V31-260618w/w patch — Notes panel icon actions

    Build: v31-r13 · Cache: librus-v31-r13 · Font: 260618v

    Area Summary
    Notes compose Highlight / save / cancel reply → icon-btn
    Note cards Jump / reply / share / delete → icon row
    Font Subset +format_ink_highlighter, save, reply, format_quote

    V31-260618v/v patch — Pages: dev-only deploy at /dev

    Build: v31-r12 (unchanged) · Deploy workflow only.

    Area Summary
    CI deploy-pages.yml triggers on dev only; prod pushes no longer deploy
    Artifact prepare-pages-artifact.sh publishes app under /dev/; root index.html redirects to dev/

    Preview URL: https://sergioshklr.github.io/librus-zero/dev/

    V31-260618u/u patch — main toolbar: font cycle + book share

    Build: v31-r12 · Cache: librus-v31-r12

    Deploy: dev + prod → GitHub Pages.

    Area Summary
    Main toolbar #reader-share-btn moved from topbar → #reader-main-toolbar-end (fixes mobile stack with context share)
    Font A+/A− replaced by #reader-font-cycle-btn — 8-step loop (81%→125%, wraps)
    Topbar Context, notes, settings only on the right
    File Change
    index.html BLOCK 08 / 11 — share relocation; font cycle button
    main.js cycleReaderFontScale, READER_FONT_SCALE_CYCLE
    sw.js / pwa.js v31-r12
